channel.title: hackathon on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in hackathon on Jonathan Ma

item.title: Get Out of the Comfort Zone
item.description: On April 22, I joined hackUST 2017, a hackathon organized by HKUST Entrepreneurship Center. For those who are still wondering: A hackathon is an event where groups of designers, idea-generators, technology experts get together to solve a problem under 24 or 36 hours, backed by technology and business ideas. My team won the Champion by developing a prototype app under 24 hours and pitching it in front of 14 judges in 3 minutes
